KAIST · Computer Science & Business Technology Management

Data science, AI/ML, operations research, optimization, analytics & finance.

I build models across data science, machine learning, operations research, and optimization — applied to problems in analytics, finance, and autonomous systems. My work spans quantitative and equity research, financial and Excel modeling, business analytics and dashboarding (Power BI, data architecture), large-scale data engineering, and applied AI research, alongside project work in reinforcement learning, credit-risk estimation, portfolio optimization, and time-series forecasting. Currently based in Daejeon, South Korea.

01 — Profile

About

KAIST undergraduate (Computer Science, double-majoring in Business Technology Management) working across quantitative research, equity research, financial modeling, and applied AI. I ranked 11th in a Kaggle competition on algorithmic trading in electricity markets (Ensimag IF 2025), and my project work spans derivative hedging with reinforcement learning, credit-risk and expected-loss estimation, portfolio optimization, and forecasting.

My path has run through buy-side research, sell-side brokerage, venture capital, and autonomous-systems optimization — always coming back to the same question: how do you build a model you can actually trust with a decision?

Currently seeking full-time or internship roles in quantitative research, data science, or ML engineering within finance.

02 — Track record

Experience

AVL·26Jul 2026 — Present
Research Intern — AI, Optimization & Autonomous Mission Systemscurrent
Avalon Aircraft · Germany · NVIDIA Inception Member
  • Contribute to mission planning and optimization for autonomous aerial and ground vehicles built around a patented in-air battery and module swapping system.
  • Develop scheduling algorithms for battery/module swap operations and autonomous docking decision logic (Dock / Abort / Retry).
  • Build mathematical models and simulations of swap operations for mission-efficiency analysis and predictive-maintenance decision support.
  • Develop a Python simulation environment for autonomous swap missions, producing optimization models and technical reports.

Private Equity & Venture Capital Interncurrent
Venture Starters

  • Engage with startup ecosystems and cross-functional teams in a fast-paced, deal-driven environment.
WQ·26Feb 2026 — Jun 2026
Quantitative Researcher
WorldQuant
  • Applied quantitative research workflows, hypothesis testing, and data-driven problem-solving to explore alpha signals.
  • Communicated findings through Python scripts, statistical summaries, and concise research memos.
  • Strengthened disciplined research habits across data cleaning, signal interpretation, and performance evaluation.
UCB·25Jul 2025 — Aug 2025
Strategic Portfolio Management Intern
UCB Stock Brokerage Limited
  • Built a price-prediction model incorporating regional time zones, trading "kill zones," volume, and volatility indices to evaluate performance across sessions.
  • Applied VaR, risk-adjusted return ratios, and index/company correlations to surface market insights.
  • Analyzed entry/exit points and peak-performance periods to detect anomalies and inform trading decisions.
  • Prepared research notes, annotated charts, and daily data-driven reports for investment discussions.

Research and Strategy Planning Intern
Shanta Securities
  • Conducted data analysis and market research to support strategy materials, business presentations, and reports.
  • Synthesized financial and industry information into clear, actionable insights for planning discussions.
  • Worked as a business analyst on the side: built Power BI dashboards and queries to surface KPIs for stakeholders.
  • Handled data modeling and data architecture for reporting pipelines, structuring source data for reliable, repeatable dashboards.
  • Built Excel-based financial and operational models to support planning and reporting alongside the Power BI work.
KCB·25Dec 2024 — Feb 2025
Data Engineer
KAIST College of Business
  • Built a large-scale pipeline to retrieve SEC EDGAR filings (10-K/10-Q) for S&P 500, NASDAQ 100, S&P 1500, and Russell 3000 companies spanning 2019–present.
  • Used Python (requests, BeautifulSoup, EDGAR API/RSS) with multiprocessing to scrape ~20 filings per company across a 5-year window.
  • Structured raw filings into JSON with standardized metadata (CIK, ticker, filing date/type) in a company-level directory structure.
  • Contributed to the foundational dataset for a Seeking-Alpha-style financial data platform for academic research.
UCB·24Jul 2024 — Aug 2024
Investment Analyst
UCB Stock Brokerage Limited

  • Tracked NAV updates and dividend announcements, ensuring timely client notifications.
  • Researched companies, industries, and macro trends into structured investment memos.
  • Conducted a full company valuation for AMARLAb as part of its investor pitch preparation.

03 — Selected work

Projects

RL · HEDGE

Reinforcement-Learning Derivative Hedging under Market Frictions

Applies reinforcement-learning methods to dynamic hedging strategies, accounting for transaction costs and other real-world market frictions.

github ↗
ELEC · ALPHA

Algorithmic Trading in Electricity Markets — Kaggle

Ranked 11th in the Ensimag IF 2025 competition, designing trading signals for volatile electricity-market price data.

github ↗
PD · EL

Loan Default Probability & Expected Loss Model

A Probability-of-Default model built on borrower income, loans, and credit history, incorporating a 10% recovery rate to estimate expected loss.

github ↗
TS · XGB

Store Sales Forecasting — DirRec Multi-Step, XGBoost

A 16-step-ahead forecasting model for the Kaggle Store Sales competition using a Direct-Recursive strategy with XGBoost.

github ↗
QP · OPT

Portfolio Quadratic Program via SciPy

Formulates and solves a portfolio-optimization quadratic program using SciPy's constrained minimization routines.

github ↗
BI · DASH

Tesla Trading Dashboard — Power BI

A financial data model and interactive Power BI dashboard tracking Tesla trading activity, built with DAX measures and a structured data architecture for live reporting.

watch demo ↗ download .pbix ↓
GAS · PRICE

Gas Storage Contract Pricing Model

A prototype pricing model for a gas storage contract for manual desk oversight, designed to extend toward automated client quoting.

github ↗
